name: OpenClawCode
description: OpenCode command handling for OpenClaw channel messages

enabled.description: Whether to enable the OpenClawCode channel command plugin

channels.description: Only enable command interception on these channel IDs; empty means all channels

accountIds.description: Only enable command interception for these account IDs; empty means all accounts

conversationIds.description: Only enable command interception for these conversation IDs; empty means all conversations

opencodeBaseUrl.description: OpenCode server base URL, for example http://localhost:4096

opencodeUsername.description: OpenCode server username for basic auth

opencodePassword.description: OpenCode server password for basic auth

defaultProjectDirectory.description: Default OpenCode project directory used when no project has been selected yet
